description: Record a Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP) transaction for your Apple (AAPL) holdings in 'My Portfolio'. Record a dividend entry of $96.00 and a corresponding buy transaction of 0.55 units at $174.55 for AAPL, both dated March 15, 2024. Include the comment 'DRIP reinvestment' for the buy transaction. Do not modify existing holdings.
